description: Symptom name stored as lowercase text, with 132 distinct values across 133 records and no missing values. Values exhibit natural structural variation between single-word terms (e.g., 'headache', 'itching') and multi-word phrases joined by underscores (e.g., 'throat_irritation', 'swollen_blood_vessels'). One value, 'fluid_overload', appears in two records.

Symptom severity or importance weight stored as integer values ranging from 1 to 7. All 133 records are populated with no missing values, and the 7 distinct values are reused across records as expected for an ordinal rating scale.
